name: Black Lychee Tea Smoked Lobster and Mango
recipeIngredient: 2 Maine lobsters, blanched and shocked in ice water, as rare as possible
1 cup Mung bean threads, blanched and shocked in ice water
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat deep hotel pan until very hot.
2. Add rice, sugar, and tea to the deep pan and immediately place lobster in the shallow perforated pan on top. Quickly seal with aluminum foil.
3. When smoker starts to smoke, smoke lobster for 10 minutes over low heat or until cooked through. Cool lobster then slice tails into long strips.
4. Combine jicama, mint, basil, bean thread, and toss with fish sauce.
5. Soak rice paper in warm water and place some of the mixture on the softened paper. Inlay smoked lobster strips and mango slices. Roll and let stand 10 minutes.
6. Individually wrap rolls tightly with plastic wrap to ensure keeping in the moisture.
